text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, Maruzensky contacts me about some
sort of "special appointment," and when I get to
the station to meet her...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: VRRROOOOM!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer! Enjoying your days of being young
and free?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer! Enjoying your days of being young
and free?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky is there in her red speedster. She
really loves that car.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
When I called my mom the other day, she said
something to me.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
She said, "You're certainly making the most of
your youth! You should remember to thank your
trainer."

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
So, I'm here to thank you and deliver some
youthful exuberance! I've got a ticket to
springtopia with your name on it! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she says this, Maruzensky pulls out something
to show me...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: It's a hot spring voucher!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh, and this is your only train there.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: If I remember correctly, you promised you would go with me!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: If I remember correctly, you promised you would go with me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's right. We made that promise when she won
the voucher from a raffle.
choice_data_list: Of course! So... should we go by train?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
What, do you want to make Tata feel bad?
C'mon, get in already! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Once we arrive at the inn, we're going to hop
right into the hot spring, then drink some milk,
and finally have a pillow fight!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: It's going to be off the chain!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Driving wildly at top speed, we somehow make it
to the hot spring in one piece...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh, are the baths being cleaned right now?

text_block_list.name: Inn Proprietress
text_block_list.text:
I'm afraid so. You have our most sincere
apologies for making you wait.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Not at all! Now that I know the baths will be
sparkling clean, I'm looking forward to them even
more!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
What do you say, Trainer? Let's go kill some time,
shall we?
choice_data_list: Maybe we can relax in our separate rooms?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
What do you say, Trainer? Let's go kill some time,
shall we?
choice_data_list: Maybe we can relax in our separate rooms?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: As if! We need a more happening plan to spend our time...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Mmm... The wind is so refreshing! And there's a
river, too!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hey, homeboy! Let's go wade in the water!
choice_data_list: Barefoot in a river... Just like when I was a kid.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hey, homegirl! Let's go wade in the water!
choice_data_list: Barefoot in a river... Just like when I was a kid.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Exactly! That's my youthtastic plan!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Let's just be kids today!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: We're the only ones here, after all!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Haha! Right answer!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: School's out for summer, so it's time to play!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Come on, let's go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Splish, splash

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Haha! This feels soooo good! Take this, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Haha! This feels soooo good! Take this, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky and I continue playing in the river
until the sun goes down.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We return to the inn soaking wet and head for the
hot spring, still laughing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Creak, creak... Spshhhh...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hm hm hmmmm! ♪ ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Ouch! What the...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I'm such an airhead! I can't believe I forgot to put
on sunscreen!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I wonder which one of us got more carried
away...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I wonder which one of us got more carried
away...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Soaking in the hot spring...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer. Wasn't the hot water just the best?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Soaking in the hot spring...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer. Wasn't the hot water just the best?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I'm glad you're enjoying yourself!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
All right, let's drink some milk next! Then it'll be
time for our pillow fight!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Let's enjoy being young a bit longer, shall we?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I sense that Maruzensky and I have formed an
irreplaceable bond during this time together.
